business.title: Finance AI Can Be 99% Accurate and Still Fail Trust, Audit Test
business.desc: A recent Sage study revealed that 71% of finance leaders would dismiss a highly accurate AI tool if it lacked explainability, emphasizing that transparency and the ability to validate AI-generated outputs are crucial for trust and compliance in financial decision-making. Sage’s research shows 71% of finance leaders would reject a 99% accurate AI tool if it cannot explain its answers. This article explores the “verification tax,” why finance AI must be explainable to pass audit and governance tests, and how vendors will need glass-box designs to win CFO trust.
